learning_objectives: Understand the fundamental concepts and applications of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD).
Grasp the general workflow of a CFD simulation (Pre-processing, Solving, Post-processing).
Learn the history, philosophy, and open-source nature of OpenFOAM.
Navigate the OpenFOAM directory structure and understand basic file conventions.
Run a first, simple tutorial case using the standard OpenFOAM workflow.

subsections: CFD Workflow: Geometry, Meshing, Physics Setup, Solving, Analysis.
Finite Volume Method (FVM) Overview: Discretization, Conservation.
Setting up the Environment: sourcing bashrc, foamVersion.
Running a First Tutorial: cavity case using blockMesh, icoFoam, paraFoam.
Basic Terminal Commands: run, foamListTimes, foamLog.
Navigate the cavity tutorial directories and identify key files.
Modify the cavity case endTime and writeInterval, then re-run.
Use paraFoam to visualize the velocity field and pressure.
